betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Nuclear weapons addon for NuclearCraft. Construct fission bombs, thermonuclear multi-block devices, and harvest nuclear byproducts like Trinitite Glass.

Progression:
    Fission Bombs - Subcritical spheres and detonation
    Thermonuclear Weapons - Multi-block hydrogen bombs
    Trinitite Glass - Harvesting nuclear byproducts
